message:
fix(store): HSCAN/SSCAN/ZSCAN should not update LRU access time

SCAN-family commands are read-only iterators and should not update
the key's last-access timestamp. Removed entry.touch(now_ms) calls
from hscan, sscan, and zscan. This fixes OBJECT IDLETIME accuracy
and prevents scanned keys from being artificially kept alive under
LRU eviction policies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
